cases.name: smt_empty_root
cases.note: E[256]: recursively derived empty root of the depth-256 tree

cases.name: smt_single_leaf
cases.note: single leaf: 255 empty siblings folded against H(leaf || key || value)

cases.name: smt_two_adjacent_keys
cases.note: two keys sharing a 255-bit prefix force a full-depth split

cases.name: smt_four_leaves
cases.note: four leaves spread across the top two path bits

cases.name: smt_wrong_value_root_rejected
cases.note: claimed root belongs to value 0xAB, pairs carry 0xAA; rebuild must not match

cases.name: smt_crossed_domain_root_rejected
cases.note: root built with D-SMT-NODE as the leaf context must not match D-SMT-LEAF law
